title: brinelsphere
body:
# brinelsphere

This modpack targets brinelsphere SMP players who would like to take full advantage of the server's modded capabilities. Contents include client performance enhancements, vanilla modifications and tweaks, and a few server-specific non-vanilla additions. 

* All content contained within this pack falling under Content Rules pt. 3 is approved on the server-side.
* Attributions can be found in .minecraft/credits.txt.

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
